Discovery 612, Defendant Leo Kaiser'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Issue Sanctions, To Compel Discovery (Continued From 9/14/10)
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT/CROSS-CLAIMANT LEO KAISER'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS, ISSUE SANCTIONS, TO COMPEL DISCOVERY.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied. Commissioner Hewlett's order was filed August 3, 2010 and ordered cross-defendant to respond to discovery within 15 days of notice of the order and pay sanctions within 30 days of notice of the order. Cross-defendant's actions were timely. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Issue Sanctions, To Compel Discovery
Off Calendar Sep-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. DEFENDANT LEO KAISER'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS, ISSUE SANCTIONS, TO COMPEL DISCOVERY is continued to September 21, 2010, per agreement of parties. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Issue Sanctions, To Compel Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Continued To Sep-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee)is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Interrogoatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT LEO KAISER's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $500, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
